info.title: Mathify API
info.description: Public REST API for generating and retrieving Mathify math animations. See app/api/v1/README.md in the source repo for the underlying implementation.

schema.description: Embed the project's fragments in the response.

post.summary: Send a message and start a generation

x-mint.content:
<Note>
This returns immediately with `status: "generating"` — it does not return the finished video. Poll `GET /fragments/{fragmentId}` until `animationUrl` is non-null.
</Note>

403.description: A valid API key is required, or the account has no active Mathify subscription

get.summary: Get a fresh signed video URL
get.description: Refreshes the stored signed URL if it has expired (24h TTL).

403.description: A valid API key is required, or the account has no active Mathify subscription

get.summary: Get the latest music job status for a fragment

403.description: A valid API key is required, or the account has no active Mathify subscription

post.summary: Apply a music track to a rendered fragment
post.description: Kicks off an async Cloud Run job.

x-mint.content:
<Note>
A `200` here means the job *started*, not that it's done. Poll `GET` on this same path until `status` is `completed` or `failed`, then re-fetch `signed-video` for the updated URL.
</Note>

422.description: Fragment/track not ready or not found

schema.description: Embed the full issue list on each eval run.

get.summary: Get all issues for an eval pipeline run
get.description: Flat list of issues across all eval runs in the pipeline.

403.description: A valid API key is required, or the account has no active Mathify subscription

name.description: Defaults to a random slug, or an AI-generated title derived from `prompt`.

forceWatermark.description: Opt into a watermarked render even if the caller's account has the no-watermark benefit.

ApplyMusicBody.description: Provide either trackSlug or random: true.

fragments.description: Only present when includeFragments=1 was requested.

description.description: The user message content that produced this fragment.

files.description: Only present when includeFiles=1 was requested.

issues.description: Only present when includeIssues=1 was requested.

apiKeyHeader.name: x-api-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Your Mathify API key (`mk_live_<64 hex chars>`), generated at /settings/api-keys.

bearerAuth.description: Same token as apiKeyHeader, passed as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
